title: valeriana fedtschenkoi
intro: Valeriana fedtschenkoi, also known as the Russian valerian or Far Eastern valerian, is a perennial herb belonging to the valerian family (Valerianaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, sedative, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of valeriana fedtschenkoi include relief from anxiety, insomnia, restlessness, and muscle spasms, as well as a reduction in stress and improved sleep quality. Valeriana fedtschenkoi can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, infusions, and dried root extracts, which are often used to promote relaxation and alleviate various health issues.
